message:
beads: close bd-zo5q (errno_ops harness matrix coverage)

errno_ops harness-matrix coverage landed in the previous frankenlibc
commit (1535ce6). Flip bd-zo5q from in_progress to closed with
close_reason documenting that the subprocess-matrix execution for
tests/conformance/fixtures/errno_ops.json is now verified locally
and via rch. The remaining matrix-coverage beads (bd-jtix, bd-x5c9,
bd-vyvv, bd-3thu, bd-cipv, bd-jitv, bd-jui3) are still open.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
